description:
Counter-Strike 2 companion that automates in-game tasks, such as accepting match, buying items and more.



Version 2.1.6 changelog
- Auto buy now doesnt open the buy menu
- Fixed crash associated with cs proccess
Full Changelog: 2.1.5...2.1.6
